behavior_summary: Registers and boots a Hydros (Water Titan) NPC when the entity is created, announcing its short name and then suspending its initializer (U8P_HYDROS::init_00).

Provides a dialog-driven interaction handler (U8P_HYDROS::init_10) that builds dynamic choice lists, presents lines and multi-choice prompts to the player, reads the player's selection, and branches across many canned responses.
Records conversation and quest progress in global flags (00E2, 00E3, 00E4, 00E5) to gate later dialog and behavior.
Can schedule delayed/timed actions and trigger in-world effects (animations, departure, and likely map/object manipulation) via engine calls when the player selects certain dialog options.

Contains helper utilities: a list/choice iterator (U8P_HYDROS::init_06) used when assembling/reading dialog lists, and a background worker (U8P_HYDROS::init_10_worker) that clears a runtime flag and calls lower-level world-manipulation routines using indices stored in locals.
notable_control_flow: Initialization (U8P_HYDROS::init_00) runs once on spawn: set NPC info/type/flags, exclude process, register short name "Water Titan ", then suspend.

Primary runtime logic is event-driven: U8P_HYDROS::init_10 acts as a conversation state machine invoked on player interaction and repeatedly presents an slist (local8) to the player and branches based on the returned selection (local5).
Dialog branches set or clear global flags (00E2/00E3/00E4) which change greetings, available options, and whether Hydros will accept help or depart.

Certain dialog choices schedule delayed callbacks (call 0581:1C8B) or call engine routines (0050:0F0F, 0050:12B0) to animate or remove the NPC; the worker (init_10_worker) performs lower-level map/object changes (call 0050:0D5F) using computed addresses/indices.
A small background worker toggles/clears global [00E5] to indicate/reset worker activity, preventing duplicate operations while world changes are applied.
open_questions: Exact meaning and game-visible semantics of global flags 00E2, 00E3, 00E4 beyond inferred conversation/quest state (names and persistent effects are not present in the disassembly).

Precise engine behavior of external call IDs (0050:0D5F, 0050:0F0F, 0581:1C19, etc.): inferred from usage but exact side effects (which tiles/objects change or what animations play) are not fully determined.
Whether U8P_HYDROS::init_10_worker is started as its own process/thread or invoked inline by init_10 in particular branches (disassembly shows a worker but not the scheduler details).
Full contents and triggers of the truncated helper U8P_HYDROS::init_08 (starts at 0x0EA7) — its role is inferred but not confirmed due to truncation.

main_function.name: U8P_HYDROS::init_00
main_function.purpose: Entity initialization: set NPC object info/flags, exclude a process from normal processing, register the short name 'Water Titan ' for the NPC, then suspend. Acts as bootstrap for the Hydros actor.
entry_conditions: Script initialization / spawn (runs once when the object/process is created).

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::init_00
function_map.role: Entity initializer / NPC registration and bootstrap

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::init_10
function_map.role: Primary conversation and interaction state machine (dialog branching, choice building, set/clear global flags, trigger world actions and timers)

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::init_06
function_map.role: Iterator/choice-list reader utility used to iterate entries in a list or buffer (helper for slist operations)

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::init_10_worker
function_map.role: Background worker that polls locals and calls lower-level engine routines to apply map/object changes; clears runtime flag global [00E5]

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::init_08
function_map.role: Truncated helper likely related to interaction callbacks/continuation of polling logic

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::calli_0049
function_map.role: Engine/IOC: present a single text message from NPC to player (used as Item/NPC bark)

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::calli_004A
function_map.role: Engine/IOC: present a slist (choice UI) to the player and return their selection

internal_calls.purpose: Iterate or read entries from a dialog/choice list while building or processing slist choices presented to the player.
Start or delegate world-modification tasks (map/object changes and worker-managed state resets) after certain dialog choices or when applying Hydros' requested action.

external_calls.purpose: Display single lines of dialog from Hydros to the player (NPC bark/text output).
Present assembled slist choices (local8) to the player and capture selection into local5.
Schedule a timed/delayed event or callback (used to defer actions after dialog branches).
Open/advance a UI or player prompt following certain dialog branches (inferred from usage context).
Commit NPC state changes (animations/movement/state update) after modifying object bytes/flags.
Trigger an in-world reaction (sound/animation/visual) when Hydros rejects or departs.
Perform a conditional check used to gate dialog paths (returns a boolean/retval used with implies).
Apply lower-level map/object modifications (likely the operation that 'frees' Hydros by altering tiles or objects) using computed addresses/indices from locals.

reads.name: global [0036 02]
reads.likely_effect: A world or quest flag read to influence an early dialog branch (tested for equality with 1).

reads.name: global [00E2 01]
reads.likely_effect: Read to choose greeting/branch variants; acts as a boolean marker for prior acknowledgement in the Hydros conversation.

reads.name: global [004E 01]
reads.likely_effect: Read to determine conversation flow or NPC state/quest progress that affects available dialog lines.

reads.name: global [00E4 01]
reads.likely_effect: Read to gate presentation of some choices and to decide whether to end the conversation.

reads.name: global [00E3 01]
reads.likely_effect: Read to branch apology/repentance dialog and determine Hydros' disposition.

writes.name: global [00E2 01]
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when the player selects a dialog option that acknowledges Hydros' identity; used to mark that an identity exchange or important dialog node occurred.

writes.name: global [00E3 01]
writes.likely_effect: Toggled by dialog outcomes to record whether the player apologized or otherwise affected Hydros' disposition.

writes.name: global [00E4 01]
writes.likely_effect: Set/cleared during interaction to control subsequent behavior, including farewell/leave branches and choice availability.

writes.name: global [00E5 01]
writes.likely_effect: Explicitly set to 0 by the worker helper to indicate/reset worker activity; used as a runtime guard to prevent repeated world modifications.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Registers and boots a Hydros (Water Titan) NPC when the entity is created, announcing its short name and then suspending its initializer (U8P_HYDROS::init_00).
